title: Agents Are Just Loops
summary: AWS Developers demonstrates how to build AI agents using the Strands Agents SDK. The video shows four progressively complex agents: single tool, multiple tool selection, instrumented with hooks, and multi-agent orchestration. All use a core agentic loop pattern where a model reasons, selects tools, executes them, and iterates.
